positive: A whimsical, abstract woodland animal portrait featuring a fox, owl, and stag standing together in a stylized circle composition. The animals should be rendered in bold, clean silhouettes with strong black outlines, filled with detailed, contrasting patterns inspired by mandalas and stained-glass art. The background should be a minimalist, deep forest canopy pattern in muted jewel tones (teal, emerald, amethyst). Style: Nordic folk art mixed with Art Nouveau geometry. High contrast, vector illustration quality, centered composition, perfect for a T-shirt print. --ar 1:1
